item.title: Pete Hegseth pulls his punches on China
item.description: America’s secretary of war meanwhile lectures America’s allies

item.title: Checks and Balance newsletter: The California outsider
item.description: Charlotte Howard, our executive editor and New York bureau chief, on the state’s bizarre gubernatorial race
